catalog.reason: Risk Auditor changed three package-facing identity-security entries and generated catalog surfaces are stale until rebuilt or verified.
catalog.action: Run or verify npm run build:catalog, then check dist/catalog.json, dist/catalog.md, and dist/install-manifest.json. Expected movement if no concurrent changes: uncategorized -3, unspecified risk -3, security-offensive +3, high +3.

risk.target: three package-facing identity-security entries listed in reports/risk/2026-07-07-0912-offensive-identity-cloud-redaction.md
risk.reason: Prior inspection found default installed procedure detail that required explicit risk handling before any package/publication endorsement.
risk.action: Classify risk, add review gates, and remove default installed procedural detail where required.
risk.resolution: Replaced the three package-facing bodies with defensive review-gated wrappers, marked them high risk and requires_review, and created a Cataloger refresh queue.

critic.reason: Catalog still has a large uncategorized-domain and unspecified-risk backlog under the current quality gate.
critic.action: Continue bounded metadata backfill batches after the open catalog refresh is verified.

progress.result: High-priority risk queue resolved; Cataloger refresh now blocks further package/publication endorsement.
